settings.heading: Care & Storage
settings.content:
Your Rangtarini piece is built to last — with a little care, it will stay luminous for years.

  • Remove jewelry before bathing, swimming, or exercising
  • Avoid contact with perfumes, lotions, and hairspray
  • Store in the airtight pouch provided, away from direct sunlight
  • Gently wipe with a soft cloth after each wear to remove moisture and oils
  • Keep pieces separately to prevent scratching

settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.content:
India — Free shipping on all orders. Delivered in 4–5 business days after dispatch.

International — Standard shipping 8–12 days after dispatch. Free shipping on orders above ₹40,000. All international orders are shipped on a DDU (Delivery Duty Unpaid) basis — import duties are the recipient's responsibility.

For expedited delivery, please chat with us on WhatsApp before placing your order.

settings.heading: 1 Year Warranty
settings.content:
Every Rangtarini piece comes with a 1-year warranty covering manufacturing defects, stone settings, plating issues, and faulty clasps under normal wear conditions.

To make a warranty claim, reach out via WhatsApp or email with your order number and photos. Our team reviews within 24–48 hours.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchange
settings.content:
We stand behind every piece. If your order arrives damaged, defective, or incorrect, we will arrange a free exchange within 7 days of delivery.

Please note: handcrafted pieces may show minor natural variations in stone, finish, or colour — these are inherent to the craft. Change of mind and sizing preferences are not eligible for exchange. Exchange is not available for orders shipped outside India.
